name: Return Window Rescue Planner
description: Build an urgent return action sheet for items with deadlines, packing needs, proof, route order, and a final checklist.
author: Bell (design)
target_user: Busy shoppers, households, assistants, and anyone trying to complete product returns before deadlines.
trigger_keywords: I need to return these before the deadline
what do I need to pack for returns
use_cases: Plan a store or carrier drop-off route
